events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: grounding electrode system, clamp not listed for direct burial. NEC 250.68 requires grounding electrode conductors connections to grounding electrodes be accessible unless buried, and clamps/b connectors must be listed for the conditions of use. A clamp not listed for direct burial is non-compliant. Fail.
